# rmpc — keybindings

## rmpc

### Transport

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `p` | Play / pause |
| `> / <` | Next / previous track |
| `s` | Stop |
| `, / .` | Volume down / up |

### Navigate

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `1 / 2 / 3` | Tabs: Queue / Directories / Search |
| `q` | Quit |
